description: Manual CSV/JSON import for one-off data loads — e.g. initial master data migration, Excel exports from legacy systems.

notes.trigger_options: ui = user uploads via UI, api = POST /api/import endpoint, schedule = periodic scheduled import
notes.format_options: csv = comma-separated with header row, json = array of objects
notes.usage: Useful for initial data loads, legacy system migrations, or periodic Excel-based updates from departments without API access.
